resposta:
solution:
```
class Solution:
    def hardestWorker(self, n: int, logs: List[List[int]]) -> int:
        work_time = 0
        res = -1
        prev_time = 0
        for log in logs:
            time = log[1] - prev_time
            if time > work_time:
                work_time = time
                res = log[0]
            prev_time = log[1]
        return res
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution iterates through the logs once, keeping track of the maximum work time and the corresponding employee id. It uses a single pass and constant extra space, making it efficient.
